name: Stinking Cloud
description: You create a 20-foot-radius Sphere of nauseating gas centered on a point within range. The cloud is Heavily Obscured and lingers for the duration (a strong wind disperses it). Each creature that starts its turn in the Sphere must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or have the Poisoned condition until the end of that turn, unable to take an action or Bonus Action while so Poisoned. Engine simplification: the CON save is rolled for creatures in the area at cast time (per the zone enter-save model).
